title: AN ACT DECLARING THE THIRD (3RD) FRIDAY OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY FOR THE CITY OF DAVAO

chunks.text:
H. No. 8309 / 97 OG No. 12, 56 Supp. (Mar. 19, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8969, October 27, 2000 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE THIRD (3RD) FRIDAY OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY FOR THE CITY OF DAVAO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The third (3

rd

) Friday of the month of August of every year is hereby declared as a special working public holiday for the City of Davao.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated

in

the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 16, 2000

and June 8, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

October 27, 2000.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the

Philippines
